Synopsis: Renames the Governor's Council on the Prevention of Mental Retardation as the Governor's Council on the Prevention of Mental Retardation and Developmental Disabilities.
Renames the New Jersey State College Governing Boards Association as the New Jersey Association of State Colleges and Universities.
Renames and expands scope of the Commission on Racism, Racial Violence and Religious Violence.
Renames Office on Minority Health in DHSS as Office on Minority and Multicultural Health and provides additional responsibilities for office; appropriates $1.5 million.*
